text: Never hardcode database credentials — always use environment variables with os.environ.get() and fail fast if missing
Always validate input with Pydantic models before any database operations — reject invalid data with 422 status
This project uses FastAPI with asyncpg for PostgreSQL access — use connection pooling with min_size=2, max_size=10
The project follows Bloomberg engineering standards: full type hints, fail-fast on missing env vars, generic error messages in production, detailed errors only in dev

To add a new endpoint: 1) Create Pydantic request/response models in models/, 2) Write the router in routers/, 3) Register in server.py with app.include_router(), 4) Add tests in tests/ using httpx.AsyncClient
Tests use pytest with httpx.AsyncClient and pytest-asyncio. Run with: pytest tests/ -v -m 'not integration'. Coverage gate at 70%.
Previous session: user designed a task management API with CRUD endpoints and asked for pagination with limit/offset
Task model has a many-to-one relationship with User model via foreign key user_id — tasks belong to users
